name: Aaron
bio: Brother of Moses, spokesman, and first High Priest of Israel.

bio: In 1 kings 4:6, father of adoniram.

name: Abdeel

name: Abdi

name: Abdi-el, son of Guni

name: Abdi, son of Malluch
bio: Male biblical protagonist in 1 chronicles 6:44, son of malluch the son of hashabiah.

name: Abdiel
bio: Human biblical figure (first book of chronicles).

name: Abdon
bio: In judges 12:13-15, judge of israel. Parents: Hillel the Pirathonite.

name: Abednego
bio: One of the three youths thrown into the furnace in the book of daniel (book of daniel).

name: Abel

bio: In 2 samuel 23:31 and 1 chronicles 11:32, one of david's 'thirty' mighty warriors.

name: Abiah

name: Adaiah

bio: Son of patriarch benjamin or his son bela according to the septuagint.

bio: Human biblical figure (second book of samuel).

name: Ahasuerus

name: Ahaz
bio: An exceedingly wicked king who sacrificed his sons in the fire and defiled the temple.

name: Ahaziah
bio: Ruled one year. Killed by Jehu during the purge of Ahab's house.

bio: Human biblical figure in 1 chronicles 2:29, son of abishur and abihail, brother of molid. Parents: Abishur, Abihail.

bio: A son of shemer, a descendant of asher.

name: Ahiel
